rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope before use in AGREE contracts.
Resolve type mismatches between assumed and actual types by aligning helper declarations with their expressions.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible identifiers and types within the same annex or accessible scopes.
Ensure all AGREE expressions have well-defined types to prevent '<error>' type diagnostics.
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in constant and equation declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Place AGREE contracts inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within valid component type or implementation scopes.
Validate that all referenced identifiers are properly declared or inherited in the current scope before use.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics; instead, correct the root cause of unresolved references or type errors.
